name: Cannon
author: David E. Whitcher (2003) / AGP port
description: Cannon (David E. Whitcher, 2003). Each player places a Town on their back rank, then 15 soldiers fight on a 10x10 grid of points. Soldiers step forward, capture forward or sideways, and may retreat two points when touching the enemy. Three soldiers in a line form a CANNON: it can slide along its line, or shoot an enemy piece 2 or 3 points beyond its muzzle without moving. Capture or shoot the enemy Town to win; a player with no legal move loses.
